whyConsultant.title: Why hire an energy consultant?
whyConsultant.subtitle: Energy consultant
whyConsultant.shortText: The energy sector is constantly evolving, with legislative changes and fluctuations in electricity and gas markets that can directly affect your costs.

howWeWork.title: How we work
steps: We analyse the most suitable type of contract according to your SME’s consumption profile.
We study in detail the different contracting options.
We review your billing every month and handle claims if necessary.
We provide continuous monitoring of your energy management.
We prepare reports to identify improvements and optimise billing.
We manage a supplier change if needed.

clients.title: Companies that trust us
clients.intro: Some of our clients and what they highlight about our service.
quotes: “Your advice gives me stability and peace of mind, and that has great value for me.” C.T.
“What I value most about your work is that you are always there.” R.I.
“This past year has been very stable and that’s why I want to renew with you.” L.P.
“12 months later: ‘Do whatever you think is best, you know I trust you.’” F.G.

hero.title: I optimise your company’s energy consumption
hero.subtitle: Independent consultancy to reduce costs and improve efficiency through data and technology.
